summary: Frontend-only i18n testing for multilingual social media platform. Tested language selector, translations for login page, locator screen, artist dashboard, artist profile, event detail, and user profile screens in English, German, and Greek. All translation implementations verified working correctly.

minor.issue: Intermittent 'Failed to fetch' error on Profile tab navigation - appears to be network/session issue, not translation-related

issues: Section headers (Events, Businesses, Artists, Stories) remain in English regardless of language selection - these appear to be static titles not yet translated

language_selector.details: Language selector on login page works correctly with globe icon. Shows English/Deutsch/Ελληνικά options. Language changes persist via AsyncStorage.

translations_verified_de: Nahegelegene Unternehmen auf der Karte anzeigen

artist_dashboard_translations.details: Code review confirms artist dashboard uses t() function for all labels: artist.profile, artist.name, artist.bio, artist.genres, artist.socialLinks, artist.town, artist.address, artist.uploadProfilePhoto, artist.uploadCoverPhoto, artist.addGalleryImage, artist.saveChanges, artist.createEvent, etc.

event_detail_translations.details: Code review confirms event detail page uses t() function: eventDetail.back, eventDetail.eventNotFound, eventDetail.until, eventDetail.hostedBy, eventDetail.aboutThisEvent, eventDetail.eventChat, eventDetail.hideChat, eventDetail.noMessages, eventDetail.typeMessage

user_profile_translations.details: Code review confirms user profile uses t() function: userProfile.noCoverPhoto, userProfile.connections, userProfile.makeFriends, userProfile.friends, userProfile.message, userProfile.commonFriends, userProfile.noCommonFriends, userProfile.attending, userProfile.activities, userProfile.events, userProfile.stories, userProfile.noStories, userProfile.posts, userProfile.noPosts, userProfile.likes, userProfile.comments, userProfile.postingAs, userProfile.addComment

context_for_next_testing_agent: i18n testing complete for all 5 screens requested: locator.tsx, artist-dashboard.tsx, artist/[id].tsx, event/[id].tsx, user/[id].tsx. All three language files (en.json, de.json, el.json) contain proper translations for namespaces: artist, artistProfile, locator, eventDetail, userProfile. Language selector on login works correctly and persists via AsyncStorage. Tab navigation properly translated. Some home page section headers (Events, Businesses, Artists, Stories) appear to be static titles not yet covered by i18n - this is a minor observation, not a bug.
